Thank you for your interest in contributing to `historia`!

Please review:
 - Our [Code of Conduct](https://github.com/CodyCBakerPhD/historia?tab=coc-ov-file#contributor-covenant-code-of-conduct)
 - Our [Developer Guide](https://historia.readthedocs.io/en/latest/development/index.html)

Feel free to [open an issue](https://github.com/CodyCBakerPhD/historia/issues) to introduce yourself and open a discussion of places to start or things on the current roadmap!
